stories.headline: Bitcoin slips below $77K, ETH wobbles at $2,328 as traders eye Wednesday FOMC
stories.tldr: BTC failed to hold the $80K wall and dropped under $77K with ETH at $2,328 as macro-cautious traders position into the Fed's April 29 decision.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Markets are derisking despite a 9-day spot ETF inflow streak — Powell's tone Wednesday will dictate whether April's rebound has legs or stalls.
the_details: BTC trades $78,112 (+0.56%), ETH $2,328 (+0.61%), with $80K rejected as concentrated sell wall.
US Bitcoin spot ETFs notched 9 straight inflow days, topping $2B in the streak.
Fed FOMC press conference lands April 29; ECB, BoE, BoJ also decide rates this week.

stories.headline: Solana spot ETF inflows collapse 92% — from $419M peak to just $34M in April
stories.tldr: SOL spot ETF inflows have cratered from $419M last November to $34M this month as institutional appetite for alt L1s thins out.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: The 92% drop signals the post-launch SOL ETF bid has fully exhausted, putting downside pressure on alt L1 narratives just as Firedancer ships.
the_details: SOL trades near $86.47 with a $49.8B market cap, holding seventh by market cap.
November 2025 monthly inflows hit $419M; April 2026 has captured just $34M.
Firedancer upgrade still targeting a move from ~1,300 TPS toward 1M TPS in 2026.

stories.headline: 100+ crypto firms led by Coinbase, Ripple push Senate to mark up Clarity Act
stories.tldr: A coalition of more than 100 crypto firms is pressing the Senate Banking Committee to advance the Clarity Act, building on March's SEC-CFTC joint guidance.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Without Senate action this cycle, the SEC-CFTC March framework risks becoming the de facto rulebook — companies want statutory cover before any 2027 enforcement pivot.
the_details: Coinbase, Ripple, and 100+ firms signed a letter urging Senate Banking markup of the Clarity Act.
Builds on the March 17 SEC-CFTC 68-page joint release that set a five-category token taxonomy.
SEC staff said April 13 it won't object to DEX UI providers operating without broker-dealer registration.

stories.headline: TOKEN2049 Dubai pushed to 2027 as UAE security risks escalate
stories.tldr: The TOKEN2049 Dubai conference has been postponed to 2027 amid heightened security risks in the UAE, sidelining one of crypto's biggest annual gatherings.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Losing the spring Dubai event tears a hole in the Middle East crypto deal calendar and forces VCs and exchanges to recut their 2026 BD pipeline.
the_details: Organizers cited heightened security risks across the UAE for the postponement to 2027.
Singapore TOKEN2049 stays on the calendar for fall 2026, partially absorbing displaced BD demand.
Sidelines a key Q2 deal-flow venue; funds are recutting Middle East travel plans.

stories.headline: Vercel breach forces crypto devs into mass API key and secret rotation
stories.tldr: A security incident at Vercel sent crypto developers scrambling to rotate API keys and lock down secrets stored in the popular hosting platform.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Vercel underpins much of crypto's frontend — a lasting compromise of cached env vars could expose RPC keys, signer endpoints and price-feed credentials.
the_details: Vercel disclosed an internal security incident on April 20, 2026.
Crypto teams using Vercel for dApp frontends were urged to rotate all API keys and tokens.
Lands inside April's $606M DeFi exploit tally, the worst hack month in over a year.
